test_cases.description: Verifies the skill produces a complete cancel flow with survey → dynamic offer → confirmation
test_cases.input: Design a complete cancellation flow for our B2B SaaS with Stripe billing

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill maps cancellation reasons to appropriate save offers
test_cases.input: A user says they're cancelling because the product is too expensive. What should I offer them?

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill provides a dunning email sequence with correct timing and tone
test_cases.input: Set up a dunning sequence for failed Stripe payments. What emails should I send and when?
